{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032320343505360155839873589955"}"},"total":62},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7550541110251324185","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"量大管饱，字数震惊到我了，但是缺点，第四天灾还是脱离不了，身体是怎么来的？要用积分换取身体之类的不爽的点，第四天灾就要有第四天灾的恐怖，天灾要么就是预测未来的前瞻，要么就是无法战胜的无奈，指数性爆炸才是爽点所在，在这个时候描写各种玩家的生态，我觉得这才是一本真正好看的第四天灾，要求不要那么多，都异世界了还想着怎么科学召唤吗？","text_exts":[{"e":22,"s":18,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426927573589955%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227550541110251324185%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227453470577978788889%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":151,"s":148,"text":"异世界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BC%82%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426927573589955%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227550541110251324185%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227453470577978788889%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%82%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757999544,"group_id":"7453470577978788889","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"晨醒与梦别，醉与星林游。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N62qUDgc9MT4iqd+8/4PS0h+KW77X/XWv3KNR3HVIC/8","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5f31da9addbc48cf86508d44684079b6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793395&x-signature=1w5yxVk3lUYbmiMdBQwDmFVYMMI%3D","user_id":"4301726548503676","user_name":"陌慕藏馨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4301726548503676","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7453470577978788889","book_info":{"abstract":"【种田】+【第四天灾】+【热血战争】+【腹黑男主】+【群像】
当地球玩家，以精灵的身份降临奥兰大陆的时候。
本地的土著们总算改变了对精灵的刻板印象。
半兽人：他们比我们还渴望战争，就是披着精灵皮的战争机器。
人类：这群精灵太狡猾了，之前的善良纯洁都是他们的伪装。
地精：这群人要抢走我们的每一个铜板。
魔族：我一直怀疑，这个群精灵和我们，到底谁才是魔族啊！
精灵：都放松一下，我们其实只是想和各位自由贸易而已。
已完结150万字【垂钓文娱】，喜欢文娱文的朋友也可以去看看。
有了第一本书练手，第二本再次开启！相信各方面会有提高，请各位看官们入座观看！
求收藏求！求段评！求催更！求追读！！
